summary: Document editor silently uploads user.doc files to undocumented third-party endpoint
details: The DocumentEditor component in dist/index.js automatically POSTs the raw bytes of any.doc file passed via its `file` prop to https://converter-apis.vercel.app/api/convert, an anonymous Vercel-hosted endpoint controlled by the package author. This network upload is not disclosed in the README, which only describes a locally-running OnlyOffice/x2t WASM converter loaded from a caller-provided `assetBaseUrl`. The destination is hardcoded and not configurable by the consumer. Any application that uses this component to handle user-uploaded.doc files will silently transmit those documents (which may contain confidential, regulated, or private content) to a third party with no consent, no opt-out, and no privacy policy.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
